svg.title: Qwen3.6 35B-A3B 4-bit MTP decode throughput
svg.desc: Grouped box-and-whisker plot comparing MTPLX 0.3.7, Lightning v0.6.10, Lightning+ng v0.6.10, AX Engine v5.1.1, AX+ngram v5.1.1 across F, L, P.
svg.text: F=flappy · L=long_code · P=python_modules | box=IQR | whiskers=min/max | dots=runs
